ksa_text: Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job configuration updates, and operational documentation maintenance.

dcwf.top_element_label: Collaborate with stakeholders to identify and/or develop appropriate solutions technology.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Collaborate with stakeholders to identify and/or develop appropriate solutions technology.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-019 (AI, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4530 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.453, eu_ai_act=0.434, ddat=0.433) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4530 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-T-019 (composite 0.4530) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4530 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Bioinformatics Technician at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4530 is not a standard requirement for Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4530, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
